module.name: report
module.spec: Summary generates a text report with total item count, total value (sum of quantity * price across all items), and average price. The report is a plain-text table with one row per item, columns: Name, Quantity, Price, LineValue. Items are sorted alphabetically by Name (no grouping). See ListItems.

LowStockReport lists items with quantity below the configured threshold (default 5, see default_config). Items are sorted alphabetically by Name (no grouping by category). Triggers a notification for each low-stock item.
ValueReport lists each item with its line value (quantity * price), sorted by line value descending (highest value first). This is the only report sorted by value rather than name. See ListItems.

SupplierReport generates a text listing of all suppliers and the items they supply. Suppliers are sorted alphabetically by Name. Within each supplier, items are sorted alphabetically. No category grouping. See ListSuppliers.
